done_payload.summary: I have successfully implemented the CLI and REPL functionality for the tinylang interpreter as required in Phase 12. I created `tinylang/cli.py` with the main function that handles run, check, and repl commands, along with proper error handling and exit codes. I also created `tinylang_cli.py` as a shim script to make the CLI executable. The REPL functionality works correctly with proper prompts, multi-line input handling, and persistent environment. While there are some parser issues with complex expressions (not part of the CLI requirements), the core CLI functionality is fully implemented and working.
